content: Google OAuth2 refresh tokens expire after 7 days when the OAuth consent screen is in 'Testing' status (external app type). Tokens also expire after 6 months of non-use. Must store refresh token securely at first auth grant; Google only returns it on first authorization or when access_type=offline + prompt=consent is explicitly forced. Must handle token_expired errors and trigger re-auth flow gracefully — not crash or silently fail.
